meta.description: Affiliate traffic management CRM for crypto/forex verticals
companion_documents: design_system.json — color palette, typography, spacing, component inventory
forms_catalog.json — all 14 forms with every field, type, validation, options
pages_catalog.json — all pages with URL, layout, toolbar, columns, API calls
api_reference.json — all discovered endpoints with methods and request/response schemas

block_1_api_architecture.summary: Two-microservice REST API behind Cloudflare. Main tracker service at /api/tracker/, UAD/scenarios service at /api/injector/. Auth via session UUID Bearer token (NOT JWT). All resources paginated with skip/take, sorted with sort[field]=direction, filtered with filter[field][op]=value.

auth.token_format: UUID v4, NOT JWT (no dot-separated structure)
auth.login_endpoint: POST /api/tracker/auth/sign-in (returns 404 — actual endpoint unknown, session set by cookies or redirect)
auth.session_behavior: Expires mid-session requiring re-login; no visible refresh token mechanism

microservices.name: tracker
microservices.purpose: Core CRM: leads, hubs, brands, affiliates, metrics, fraud, conversions, accounts, company

microservices.name: injector
microservices.purpose: UAD (User Action Director) scenarios — automated lead re-injection engine

api_conventions.filtering: filter[fieldName]=value OR filter[fieldName][op]=value (op: gte, lte, etc.)
api_conventions.code_format: Human-readable short codes in UI (BR-, BI-, BX-, SCN-, FP- prefixes)

error_codes_observed.401: Account not authorized (acNA) — session expired or missing auth header
error_codes_observed.500: Internal server error on some filter queries
error_codes_observed.503: Service unavailable — occasional transient errors on box and lead endpoints

block_2_hidden_features.summary: Several non-obvious capabilities discovered through deep exploration.

features.name: Dual-service architecture
features.detail: UAD (Scenarios) runs on a completely separate microservice /api/injector/ — not /api/tracker/. This implies separate deployment, scaling, and codebase for the automation engine.

features.name: subId_f as UAD tracking field
features.detail: The UAD/Scenarios system tags leads via filter[subId_f][0]=uad_{scenarioId_short}. Sub F slot is reserved for internal system tracking of scenario membership.

features.name: scenarioId filter on leads
features.detail: Leads can be filtered by filter[scenarioId]={uuid} — enabling scenario-level lead attribution in the leads table.

features.name: Company-scoped resource storage
features.detail: Fraud profiles, stop statuses, and scoring config are stored at company level: /api/tracker/company/resources/{type}/{companyId}. This suggests multi-tenancy with company isolation.

features.name: Account-scoped Telegram bots
features.detail: Telegram bots are per-account (not per-company): /api/tracker/account/resources/botSubscriber. Each user can have their own notification bot.

features.name: Dual fraud system
features.detail: Two complementary fraud systems: (1) binary per-attribute Allow/Block profiles assigned to streams, (2) weighted numeric scoring (0-100) per attribute with category-level balancing producing a fraud score. The score uses an MI (Machine Intelligence) coefficient for AI-detection strictness.

features.name: Integrator TelegramBot template
features.detail: CRM integrators list includes 'TelegramBot' as a named integration template — meaning Telegram can be used as a CRM destination for lead routing, not just for notifications.

features.name: Integrator GoogleSheets and MT4 templates
features.detail: 134 CRM templates include GoogleSheets and MT4 — non-standard integrations enabling routing to Google Sheets or MT4 trading platforms.

features.name: Hypernet self-integration
features.detail: The integrator list contains 'Hypernet' as a named template — the platform integrates with itself, likely for internal routing or cross-account lead passing.

features.name: Autologin overridable per integration
features.detail: Brand integration has isAutologinOverridden and autologinCustomURL fields — autologin URL can be custom per integration, not just per brand.

features.name: Ignore stream settings in scenarios
features.detail: UAD scenarios have 'Ігнорувати налаштування потоку' (Ignore stream settings) flag — scenarios can bypass normal stream routing rules.

features.name: Fallback hub mode
features.detail: Hubs have 'Резервний режим' (fallback mode) indicator — hubs can act as fallback destinations when primary routes fail.

features.name: Hub deduplication
features.detail: Hubs have 'Блокувати дублікати' (block duplicates) indicator — built-in deduplication at hub level.

features.name: Proxy support in scenarios
features.detail: UAD scenarios support proxy routing (Використовувати проксі toggle) with a named proxy selection (e.g. HYPER-1). Scenarios can inject leads through proxies.

features.name: Continuous sending mode
features.detail: Scenarios have 'Безперервна відправка' (continuous sending) checkbox — allows the scenario to keep sending leads continuously rather than in batches.

features.name: Inject modes
features.detail: UAD scenarios have a 'Режим інжекту' (inject mode) field with option 'Змінити реєстрацію' (Change registration) — implies multiple injection modes (re-register, re-route, etc.).

features.name: Scenario affiliate replacement
features.detail: Scenarios have 'Змінити афілейта' (Change affiliate) toggle — scenarios can override the original affiliate attribution when re-injecting leads.

features.name: Company API endpoint exposed
features.detail: GET /api/tracker/company/{companyId} — full company profile endpoint exists, indicating multi-company architecture in the backend.

features.name: 17 Telegram notification event types
features.detail: Bot notification system supports: Перенесення ліда успішне, Помилка перенесення ліда, Ліда не призначено, Створено новий статус бренду, Ліміт обсягу лідів для інтеграції хаба, Відбулася конверсія, Аномалії ліда (перенаправлення/фрод/недійсний статус), Акаунт ліміт перевірок на фрод, Ліміт кількості лідів за підпискою, Ліміт автологін редиректів, Ліміт холду конверсій, Повідомляти про ліди з невалідним профілем, Лід заблокований через підозру на фрод, Виявлено нову воронку, Експорт лідів.

features.name: Funnel auto-detection
features.detail: Telegram notification type 'Виявлено нову воронку' (New funnel detected) implies automatic funnel discovery — the system detects new traffic funnels automatically.

frontend.ui_library: Angular Material (mat-* components confirmed in DOM)
frontend.chart_library: Unknown (not ApexCharts, Chart.js, Highcharts, or ECharts at window scope — likely lazy-loaded as Angular modules)
frontend.icon_library: Stockholm Icons (SVG sketches referenced in DOM as 'Stockholm-icons / General / Duplicate Created with Sketch.')
frontend.forms: Angular Reactive Forms (confirmed by ng-model binding behavior)

backend.architecture: Microservices (at minimum: tracker service, injector service)
backend.query_style: flat query string parameters with bracket notation for nested filters

infrastructure.cdn_waf: Cloudflare (server: cloudflare, CF-Ray header, NEL reporting)
infrastructure.caching: Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600 (1 hour for SPA assets)
infrastructure.error_tracking: None detected (no Sentry, no Datadog, no LogRocket)

api_docs.conclusion: No public API documentation — all /api-docs variants return SPA

observed_issues.issue: Angular Reactive Form doesn't accept programmatic value setting
observed_issues.detail: form_input and direct .value= do not trigger Angular's form model updates — requires keyboard simulation to properly bind values. Affects users using password managers or browser autofill.

observed_issues.issue: Session expires without warning during active use
observed_issues.detail: No visible session timeout warning or refresh mechanism — user is silently redirected to login and loses in-progress work.

observed_issues.issue: API returns 503 intermittently on lead list endpoint
observed_issues.detail: GET /api/tracker/lead returned 503 Service Unavailable multiple times — service reliability issue.

observed_issues.issue: Global rotation view has no edit-in-place capability
observed_issues.detail: The global Rotations page (/rotations/streams/list) shows all stream attachments but the settings gear opens a context menu only — no inline editing of weight/priority.

observed_issues.issue: No individual status group profile page
observed_issues.detail: Clicking into a status group row only highlights it — no drill-down profile page. Individual status names within a group are not visible from the list.

observed_issues.issue: Integration template catalog (134 items) not searchable in creation modal
observed_issues.detail: When creating a new brand integration, the integrator selection loads all 134 templates but UX discoverability is limited.

observed_issues.issue: Scenarios named inconsistently (some in Russian, some in English)
observed_issues.detail: Real user data shows mixed-language scenario names: 'Нерабочая Канада', 'отказ Канада', 'FR_RESEND' — no naming convention enforcement.

observed_issues.issue: Category balancing weights don't sum to 100%
observed_issues.detail: IP:30 + Email:30 + Phone:100 + Messengers:30 = 190 — weights are not normalized percentages but multipliers, which may be unintuitive.

observed_issues.issue: Sidebar collapses on certain navigation actions
observed_issues.detail: Navigating to some modules causes the sidebar to collapse to icon-only mode unexpectedly, requiring an extra click to re-expand.
Account roles have a safeUsageModeON field visible in API but not clearly documented or explained in the UI.

block_5_competitive_signals.market_positioning: CRM middleware for crypto/forex affiliate networks — sits between traffic sources (affiliates) and CRM destinations (brands). Not a CRM itself, but a routing and tracking layer.
block_5_competitive_signals.target_customers: Affiliate network operators (not individual affiliates or brands directly). Customers are likely mid-to-large networks with 10+ brands and 20+ affiliates.

competitor_integrations_visible.comment: The fact that Scaleo, Skale, and IREV appear as integration TEMPLATES means HyperOne customers can route leads INTO these competing platforms — indicating customers may run HyperOne alongside competitors, or are migrating from them.

134_crm_integrations_analysis.impression: Extremely broad integration coverage suggests mature product with years of integration development. 134 templates is a significant moat.

pricing_model_signals.financial_model_in_product: Buy price / Sell price per affiliate attachment (CPA or CPL), suggesting the platform captures the spread between affiliate payment and brand payment
pricing_model_signals.deal_types: CPA (Cost Per Acquisition/Deposit) and CPL (Cost Per Lead) only

scalability_signals.hub_rotation_records: 110 records in hub rotations — substantial real usage

version_history_signal.interpretation: v4.0 major version with 136 minor builds — product has gone through at least 4 major architectural versions. Mature codebase.

unique_differentiators: Built-in fraud scoring with ML coefficient (MI coefficient)
Dual fraud system: binary profiles + weighted scoring
UAD (User Action Director) for automated lead re-injection — uncommon in this category
Conversion hold mechanism with auto-confirmation and stop-status lists
Stream rotation with 7 filter dimensions (GEO, Schedule, Offers, Sub A-F, UTM)
Fallback hub mode for high-availability routing
JMESPath response parsing for CRM integration (technical sophistication)
weaknesses_observed: No HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options security headers
No real-time updates visible (polling-based or manual refresh)

modules.name: Метрики (Metrics)
key_features: Metrics by: Brand Status Groups or Affiliate Status Groups
Date range filtering with period selector
Affiliate / Brand / Hub tables with deposit metrics
Sub ID, UTM, autologin status, funnel, language tables

modules.name: Ліди (Leads)
key_features: Multiple GEO, status, and attribute filters

modules.name: Статус групи (Status Groups)
modules.description: Groups of brand CRM statuses for analytics segmentation
key_features: Per-group: isSystemDefault, isValid, isWatched, qualityScore flags
Groups used as dimensions in Metrics module
Switchable between Brand and Affiliate status group views in Metrics
Groups: Ungrouped, CrossLead, Potential, Wrong Language, Callback, Deposit, Not interested, WrongAge, No answer, In Work

modules.name: ГЕО групи (GEO Groups)
modules.description: Country groupings for stream and hub rotation filtering
key_features: 5 groups in demo: LATAM, TEST, RU EU, EUROP, RU_EU
Used as filter dimension in stream rotation rules

modules.name: Акаунти (Accounts)
modules.description: User account management with 4 role types

modules.name: Афілейти (Affiliates)
key_features: Used in hub rotation pricing model (buy/sell price per affiliate)

modules.name: Бренди (Brands)
key_features: 5-tab profile: Primary, Integrations, Streams, Accounts, Statistics
4 system indicators: Відкритий (Open), Синхронізований (Synced), Блокування фрода (Fraud block), Постбек (Postback)

config_format.push: url, body, params, headers, bodyType, redirect, response(path/parser/schema/dataType), requestType, leadOptionPlace, successCondition

integrator_structure.success_condition: array of conditions for CRM response validation

modules.name: Хаби (Hubs)
modules.description: Hub routing nodes connecting affiliates to brands
key_features: 3 system indicators: Надсилається (Sending), Блокувати дублікати (Block duplicates), Резервний режим (Fallback mode)
Per-affiliate pricing: buy price, sell price, deal type (CPA/CPL), currency (USD/EUR)

modules.name: Ротації (Rotations)
modules.description: Global view of all stream and hub rotation attachments

filter_dimensions: Sub A-F (subId filters A through F)
UTM (NO schedule, NO quota in hub rotations)

modules.name: UAD менеджер / Сценарії (UAD Manager / Scenarios)
modules.description: Automated lead re-injection engine — schedules batch re-sending of leads to different brands/integrations
key_features: Context menu: Переглянути, Створити копію, Зупинити, Видалити
Management button: Створити копію, Зупинити, Видалити

fields: Ігнорувати налаштування потоку (Ignore stream settings checkbox)
Режим інжекту (Inject mode: Змінити реєстрацію = Change registration)
Змінити афілейта (Change affiliate toggle + Affiliate selector)
Використовувати проксі (Use proxy toggle + proxy name)
Встановити дату зупинки (Set stop date checkbox)
Використовувати інтервал хвилини (Use interval in minutes: min-max range slider)

profile_tabs.selected_leads_tab: Обрані ліди — leads matching scenario filters (API: filter[scenarioId]={uuid})
profile_tabs.used_leads_tab: Використані ліди — leads already processed by this scenario

modules.name: Конверсії (Conversions)
modules.description: Conversion hold management and stop-status configuration

hold_tab.name: Холд
hold_tab.description: Leads awaiting conversion confirmation (in hold state)

stop_statuses_tab.name: Стоп статуси
stop_statuses_tab.description: List of brand CRM status strings that terminate the conversion hold timer

modules.name: Телеграм боти (Telegram Bots)
key_features: Context menu: Налаштувати сповіщення (Configure notifications), Заблокувати (Block)
notification_events: Створено новий статус бренду (New brand status created)
Ліміт обсягу лідів для інтеграції хаба (Hub integration lead volume limit)
Аномалії ліда: виявлено перенаправлення (Lead anomaly: redirect detected)
Аномалії ліда: виявлено фрод (Lead anomaly: fraud detected)
Аномалії ліда: виявлено недійсний статус (Lead anomaly: invalid status detected)
Акаунт: ліміт перевірок на фрод (Account: fraud check limit reached)
Ліміт кількості лідів за підпискою (Lead count limit by subscription)
Ліміт автологін редиректів (Autologin redirect limit reached)
Ліміт холду конверсій (Conversion hold limit reached)
Повідомляти про ліди з невалідним профілем (Notify about leads with invalid profile)
Лід заблокований через підозру на фрод (Lead blocked due to fraud suspicion)

modules.name: Анти-фрод (Anti-fraud)
modules.description: Dual fraud detection system: binary allow/block profiles + weighted numeric scoring

fraud_profiles_tab.name: Фрод профілі
fraud_profiles_tab.description: Named fraud profiles with binary Allow/Block per-attribute rules, assigned to streams

fraud_scoring_tab.name: Оцінка фрода
fraud_scoring_tab.description: Company-level weighted fraud score configuration — each attribute has a 0-100 weight slider; final score is weighted average across categories

category_balancing.description: Determines % of each category score in final total
category_balancing.reset_link: Встановити налаштування за замовчуванням (Reset to defaults)

modules.name: Вертикалі (Verticals)
modules.description: Vertical templates that define the lead profile field schema. Read-only list — only the system administrator can create verticals. Oldest record in the system (2022).
key_features: Row selection via radio button (single-select, NOT navigation to profile)
Clicking a row does NOT open a detail page
Vertical defines the dynamic field set for lead profiles
Lead creation and Hub creation require selecting a vertical
Created 2022-08-03 — the oldest record in the system
modules.competitive_insight: The vertical system is a multi-tenant configuration layer. Different verticals (gambling, forex, crypto) would have different lead profile schemas. Currently only 'Base' is configured, suggesting demo is set up for a single vertical use case.

company_api.implication: Multi-company architecture — each tenant has a UUID company ID

vendor_discovery.note: From memory context: VendorDiscoveryUpdater ETL task runs 30-min periodic vendor sync from all aggregators, suggesting upstream aggregator/provider integrations beyond just brand CRMs
